job_description:
# Sr. Data Analyst- Remote
Company: Sharecare
Source: Official company posting via Workday
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://sharecare.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/Sharecare_Careers/job/Sr-Data-Analyst--Remote_R-101790

## Highlights
- Remote senior data analyst role in digital health.
- Posted 18 days ago.
- Focuses on data integrity, membership eligibility, healthcare claims, pharmacy data, SQL querying, anomaly resolution, validation, customer data intake, and BI dashboards.
- Strong overlap with healthcare domain, SQL, validation, data quality, and operational support.
strengths: Strong match on eligibility, claims, healthcare data integrity, and SQL-heavy analysis.
Resume already supports validation, anomaly investigation, reporting, and stakeholder coordination.
Official posting within the last 60 days.
gaps: Membership intake and customer implementation ownership may be broader than the current resume emphasis.
Role mentions Python for repeatable tasks; resume supports only modest/upskilling depth.
notes: High-priority official posting. Emphasize healthcare eligibility and claims work, SQL, anomaly/root-cause analysis, data validation, and reporting quality. Keep Python wording conservative.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Eligibility & Claims Data | Reporting Quality

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across payer-focused healthcare environments. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for roles centered on eligibility, claims, anomaly investigation, and dependable reporting operations.

replacements.find: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards and downstream KPIs.
replacements.replace: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer data operations, dashboards, and downstream KPIs.
